channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin bounces as big tech earnings fuel optimism; short-term pressures remain
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 1, 2026

item.title: SBI Holdings eyes stake in crypto exchange Bitbank to build digital asset powerhouse
item.description: The Tokyo-based broker is betting big on crypto with plans in Singapore and a Visa partnership for bank cards that allows users to accumulate digital assets.

item.title: South Korean Court Lifts Bithumb's Six-Month Business Suspension
item.description: A Seoul court has reversed March sanctions that would have restricted the exchange's core functions over alleged compliance failures.

item.title: Bitcoin ticks higher, but remains range-bound as traders keep short bias
item.description: BTC rises to $77,000 after holding $75,000 support, but negative funding, unchanged open interest and cautious positioning signal a lack of conviction.

item.title: Brazil bars crypto settlement in regulated cross-border payment rails
item.description: Brazil’s central bank barred virtual assets from settlement inside regulated eFX payment rails as it tightens oversight of crypto-linked flows.

item.title: SBI eyes Bitbank deal as Japan’s crypto exchange market consolidates
item.description: SBI Holdings is in discussions to make Bitbank a subsidiary, adding to its push to acquire crypto exchanges amid improving regulatory clarity in Japan.

item.title: Bitcoin edges above $77,000, but institutional activity suggests downside hedging
item.description: BTC rises on steady volume and strong technical structure, but surging put interest and muted prediction market odds point to defensive positioning.

item.title: Bitcoin seals best monthly gain in a year as S&P 500 hits fresh all-time high
item.description: Bitcoin finished April above $76,000 to preserve most of its monthly gains, but the S&P 500 stole the limelight with a trip back to record highs.

item.title: Bakkt completes acquisition of stablecoin payments firm Distributed Technologies Research
item.description: Bakkt announced the deal in January, which was originally for 9.3 million shares, along with a corporate name change to Bakkt Inc.

item.title: Bithumb scores a legal win in South Korea as six-month suspension is lifted by local judge
item.description: South Korea's financial watchdog imposed a $24.6 million fine on Bithumb and partial suspension that came into effect last month.

item.title: Strategy keeps STRC dividend at 11.5% as stock logs first monthly gain in nine
item.description: STRC’s volume weighted average price of $99.76 for April kept the dividend steady for a third consecutive month.

item.title: Bitcoin risks extended retreat as April rally was futures-driven: CryptoQuant
item.description: Futures drove up Bitcoin's price in April while spot demand declined, which CryptoQuant warned has historically preceded extended price declines.

item.title: Bitcoiners launch 'The Bitcoin Evidence Base' to stamp out FUD
item.description: The Bitcoin FUD-stopping tool cites over 22 peer-reviewed research papers to address common misconceptions about Bitcoin.

item.title: DeFi protocol Carrot becomes first casualty of $285M Drift exploit
item.description: Carrot's total value locked has collapsed 93% in a month, from $28 million to $1.99 million, leaving the protocol financially unable to continue.

item.title: Bitcoin’s surge to $77K pressures shorts, but absent spot and long leverage caps rallies
item.description: Bitcoin bulls took another swing at the $77,000 resistance, but profit-taking and traders’ reluctance to increase margin and spot longs limit the strength of each breakout.

item.title: Tokenized RWA market grows 420% since 2025 on regulatory clarity, access
item.description: Tokenized US Treasurys were one of the biggest growth areas of the RWA market, rising from a market capitalization of $3.9 billion at the start of 2025 to more than $15 billion.

item.title: Crypto cards are not a trend. They are the next evolution of distribution. Stablecoins have already moved beyond wallets into everyday spending at global scale. The next phase is seamless access. Digital assets integrated directly into how people pay, anywhe - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE0yVkNON21kWnVvbUxPT01JMmVnNW94by1wdGZ5eWNuN1lmOFQwRnpKeXpYak14R2ZlZGZYRE43TGVXVGZaSV95bEtHYzBGMFBVejJoQ053VXI0S01ZR2tjdk9aVkQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto cards are not a trend. T…

item.title: US Senate bans itself from betting on prediction markets
item.description: The US Senate unanimously passed a rule banning members and staff from prediction markets, with a similar resolution set to be introduced in the House.

item.title: 🚨ALERT: NEW ETHEREUM WALLET EXPLOIT DETECTED Hundreds of wallets, many inactive for 7+ years, were just drained by the same address on Ethereum mainnet. The activity suggests a possible new live exploit and is being closely monitored. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE5xU3JsdkI0LVZqSWtIeXV4eUl1SFd6R1NaNFpoMUlkTVA2dUZYVGhXT2ZfMl9rU3M1SjNYNlhhVTEzQzZVeDdyVDFVLVN6N195VDFUdU5VMVB0NElERkk2Vg?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨ALERT: NEW ETHEREUM WALLET EXPLOIT…

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETF outflows top $490M: Is BTC’s rally losing momentum?
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETF outflows reached $490 million as crypto investors considered the impact of high oil prices, Big Tech earnings and a shortfall in AI industry growth metrics.

item.title: Tether-backed Oobit rolls out virtual Visa cards for AI agent USDT spending
item.description: The Agent Cards launched to a select group of businesses on Thursday, with a limited number of additional companies set to gain access over the next two months.

item.title: Repeated Bitcoin profit taking near $77K suggests rally is losing steam
item.description: Short-term traders took profit each time BTC rallied above $77,000, creating overhead sell pressure that has capped BTC’s ability to reach $80,000.

item.title: U.S. senators won't be weighing in on prediction markets bets after banning themselves
item.description: The Senate agreed unanimously to revise its rules to ban members and their staffs from wagers on prediction markets platforms.

item.title: Mistral AI Drops New Open-Source Model. The Internet Is Not Impressed, Except for One Thing
item.description: Mistral Medium 3.5 is the rare Western entry in the open-source top tier, but it costs multiples more than Chinese rivals that beat it on benchmarks.

item.title: Stablecoins overtake Bitcoin in Latin America crypto purchases: Bitso
item.description: A Bitso report shows shifting user behavior as dollar-linked stablecoins gain traction for everyday financial use across Latin America’s inflation-hit economies.

item.title: Elon Musk Says xAI Used OpenAI Models to Train Grok
item.description: The admission in federal court is a rare acknowledgment of the use of distillation techniques as AI firms compete to build more capable and cheaper models.

item.title: Bitcoin Crash Incoming? April Surge Was Built on Shaky Ground, Analysts Warn
item.description: Analysts warn that the Bitcoin rally was fueled by speculative futures trading, mirroring conditions that preceded the 2022 crypto crash.

item.title: XRPLV was the first crypto conference I ever attended back in 2023 when I started covering the @Ripple case. Thanks to Brad + Danielle for having me back every year. Lucky to interview @bgarlinghouse, @KeithGrossman, @ashgoblue, @Matt_Hougan & @ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBCX2tHNjN3UTN2VDZWdEYxUDNSV1VyeGN0WEkyWXdtcldiZUpYSDUzQV9qYkVxV2F0U3FRZmVicHF2dkktS3k2WXVIRUhkVk5GcWZOS0tBdGE5RTVzazhWbkk3VVNjdw?oc=5" target="_blank">XRPLV was the first crypto c…

item.title: OpenAI Rolls Out Advanced Account Security for ChatGPT Users
item.description: OpenAI's new opt-in security feature requires passkeys, limits recovery options, and excludes chats from training.

item.title: Holding #Altcoins or #Bitcoin here is quite stressful. There's so much happening in the world, the Nasdaq goes up, that you start questioning holding any of those assets. I think it's even harder than the 2018 or 2022 bear markets, as during those periods, we h - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE0xcGx3VmNhbFVxWUVoV2xRS0R4c095aE1nUmtXenBMRGhzbXpmRzZqNmhOWjF5NHp1bUIzTG5YbVB6d0V5cWVTdE5VajFZZ2p3aDN6aTZrSWUxVDY1aVpGR0FMdw?oc=5" target="_blank">Holding #Altcoins or #Bitcoin he…

item.title: Ubuntu Linux Is Adding AI Features—Its Users Are Worried
item.description: Canonical announced plans to bake AI into Linux's most popular distro. The community that chose Ubuntu specifically to avoid this kind of thing was not thrilled.

item.title: #Ethereum / $ETH god candle szn is coming - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5xalNOWjFGRU80ZEhndzRnTzVQb1NSaVBOSEFPdEl6Q1d5X1VMMTdSSmlPbnBNbUw3bGthZk1PWHhTX1RZZXNjSlRFR1RYNVRnTVRTSm5LRTY0VDVNeGxJLWdB?oc=5" target="_blank">#Ethereum / $ETH god candle szn is…

item.title: From Cathie Wood to Cantor Fitzgerald, the big money is betting that Robinhood’s crypto slump is just a temporary speed bump
item.description: Cathie Wood’s Ark Invest snapped up over 500,000 shares of Robinhood on Wednesday, joining a wave of analysts who believe a surge in April trading activity will outweigh a recent earnings disappointment.

item.title: Senate Votes to Ban Senators and Staff From Using Prediction Markets
item.description: S. Res. 708 prohibits senators and staff from using prediction markets, and became effective immediately upon passage.

item.title: Bitcoin’s $75K cost basis emerges as key support zone for current bull trend
item.description: Bitcoin found support above a key investor cost-basis level as spot BTC ETF flows and spot positioning compressed BTC’s price range in preparation for the next trending move.

item.title: North Korean Hackers Have Stolen $6 Billion in Crypto—Including 76% of 2026's Spoils: TRM
item.description: Pyongyang-linked hackers drained $577 million from two DeFi platforms in April, underscoring an escalating threat to crypto markets.

item.title: Insider trading backlash forces Polymarket to step up surveillance
item.description: Polymarket has selected Chainalysis to flag suspicious trades as insider betting concerns mount and regulators tighten scrutiny on prediction markets.

item.title: OpenAI Finally Explains Why ChatGPT Wouldn't Stop Talking About Goblins
item.description: Why did OpenAI have to write "never mention goblins" into its production code on ChatGPT? The company has published a post-mortem.

item.title: Sentora brings institutional DeFi to the public with the launch of its Smart Yield platform
item.description: Sentora has announced that Sentora Smart Yield is now publicly available, opening access to its DeFi vault discovery and monitoring platform to all users.

item.title: Agentic Memory: Walrus Takes On AI's Next Big Bottleneck
item.description: Long-term memory limits what AI agents can do. Walrus is going after it with MemWal plus new OpenClaw and NemoClaw integrations.

item.title: Crypto Is the Most Muted Topic on Elon Musk’s X, Ahead of Politics: Product Head
item.description: Internal data shows users mute crypto more than politics and global conflict on X’s For You feed.

item.title: ⚡️ELON MUSK: "MOST CRYPTO ARE SCAMS" Elon Musk says “some crypto assets have merit, but most are scams,” during testimony tied to his lawsuit over OpenAI’s past ICO plans, per Fortune. Musk previously backed the sector, including Tesla’s $1.5B B - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE9OaFk5MHdUVFVYc0JmV0xSczFibk1odEtnZi04Q2haQmN1Q0tRZ2duUU1tMk9DeU13LWVzN09nVzJJeklQOTl1Z1M0amFMeGd3dVZJLTVTVmxCRUJ0U0RoWQ?oc=5" target="_blank">⚡️ELON MUSK: "MOST CRYPTO ARE SCAMS"…

item.title: Polymarket Launches Market Integrity Tools Following Soldier’s Insider Trading Arrest
item.description: The team-up between Polymarket and Chainalysis aims to bring institutional-grade compliance monitoring to crypto prediction markets.

item.title: Senator Warren questions Commerce Secretary Lutnick on Tether loan to family
item.description: Senators Elizabeth Warren and Ron Wyden sent letters to Howard Lutnick and Tether CEO Paulo Ardoino asking about a loan Tether reportedly made to Lutnick's family.

item.title: MegaETH Token Launches as Ethereum Layer-2 Network's Novel Rewards System Is Tested
item.description: Ethereum layer-2 network MegaETH will unlock its native MEGA token over time, and reward it to users, as key benchmarks are met.

item.title: Three reasons why $3K ETH price target is back for May
item.description: Despite Ether’s 8% deviation from 10-week highs above $2,460, data suggests that ETH's price could still rise toward $3,000 as a new month begins.

item.title: Bitcoin Coinbase Premium threatens bear flag repeat with BTC price at $76K
item.description: Bitcoin price action risked repeating January's breakdown despite April being poised to offer the best monthly BTC price gains in a year.

item.title: HederaCon 2026 comes to Miami Beach on May 4 — Last chance to join leaders in tokenization and digital finance
item.description: HederaCon 2026 will take place on May 4 at the Faena Forum in Miami Beach, bringing together leaders from global finance, policy, and enterprise to explore how tokenization, stablecoins, interoperability, and AI-powered financial systems a…

item.title: Twenty-One Weighs Mergers With Strike, Elektron to Create Publicly Traded Bitcoin Giant
item.description: Tether Investments proposed a three-way merger to create a Bitcoin platform combining mining, treasury management, and financial services

item.title: A Polymarket-linked bet on the weather in France forecasts a major data issue
item.description: The incident shows that as more real-world outcomes become tradable, the real bottleneck is not trading itself, but the integrity and certification of the data used for settlement, argues Hallali.

item.title: Gemini eyes prediction market challenge to Kalshi, Polymarket, secures derivatives license; shares surge
item.description: Tyler and Cameron Winklevoss' crypto exchange now holds licenses allowing it to expand into regulated derivatives and prediction markets, the fastest-growing sectors in crypto.

item.title: Polymarket taps Chainalysis to bring Wall Street-level oversight to crypto prediction markets
item.description: By partnering with Chainalysis to monitor its blockchain data in real-time, Polymarket is signaling to both users and regulators that it is serious about eliminating insider trading and market manipulation.

item.title: Gemini Gains Key CFTC Approval to Expand Prediction Market, Perps Offerings
item.description: A DCO license will now allow crypto exchange Gemini to act as a clearinghouse for its derivatives-related businesses.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Breaking down the Sui blockchain
item.description: Sui is a differentiated Layer-1 blockchain, combining novel object-based architecture and parallel execution for high throughput. It's optimized for consumer Web3 apps.

item.title: Anchorage Digital and M0 team up to power next wave of regulated stablecoins
item.description: Anchorage seeks to expand its issuance platform through M0, and opens the door to a broad range of firms looking to launch U.S.-regulated stablecoins.

item.title: Coinbase's asset manager to offer stablecoin credit fund with tokenized share class
item.description: The fund, dubbed CUSHY, targets yield from onchain lending and private credit, offering tokenized access through Superstate for institutional investors.

item.title: Banks push to slow stablecoin law as Agora races for charter
item.description: U.S. banks are looking to delay landmark stablecoin legislation even as crypto firms like Agora push ahead.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Falls After Powell's Likely Final FOMC
item.description: No rate cuts are coming any time soon, Big Tech earnings gave AI bulls more to work with, and Meta is back in crypto payments with USDC creator payouts.

item.title: Binance co-CEO Yi He's Hong Kong AMA: I agree that Bitcoin will definitely replace and surpass gold; it's only a matter of time. The new goal Binance set for our employees this year is to grow our user base tenfold. Whether a project is worth paying attention to - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE0ycDg0cFdzdFNZZGhCNDlNVXo1RmlzNWJ0UUY4WWV3ay16TWlyQXFMdzVuWXBld2dTcUpxNUVxZGo5Z2RKUG5xdkI3QW9HY3hTVklpS0RuaTdVbVcyUzY1aEQwbw?oc=5" target="_blank">Binance co-CEO Yi He's Hong Kong…

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Aptos (APT) gains 4.4% as nearly all assets rise
item.description: Internet Computer (ICP), up 2.4% from Wednesday, joined Aptos (APT) as a top performer.
